{{Quote|Nice try, Odanni, but you aren't getting the merchandise, no matter how well you feed me.|Geffa shortly before dying from poison|<ref name="WHSV" />}}
'''Odanni''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] and the proprietor of [[Fathoms]], which was a resort complex in [[Wildwater City]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dac/Legends|Dac]]. She was also a ruthless [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] who dominated the underworld of Wildwater City.

==Biography==
Odanni worked tirelessly to build [[Fathoms]] restaurant from a small operation into a first-rate entertainment complex. She expanded Fathoms to include three other businesses: the [[HyperDive Cantina]], [[Wave Works]] and the [[Seabed Lodge]].

[[File:OdanniPoisoner.png|thumb|left|250px|Odanni watches as Geffa chokes on poisoned food. Nollo Kanx, her enforcer, watches from the shadows.]]

Behind the glittery exterior, Odanni had set up a large criminal empire that used her operations as fronts. She employed the [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] [[Nollo Kanx]] as her chief enforcer. They typically used poison as a way to deal with those that tried to cross them. When [[Geffa]], a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Spice/Legends|spice]] dealer tried to change a deal at the last minute and charge an extra ten percent markup, Odanni and Kanx poisoned him through the food at her restaurant. Her criminal empire included spice dealing, [[Black market/Legends|black market]] sales, money laundering, and fencing stolen goods.

==Personality and traits==
Odanni was strong willed, opinionated, and stubborn which was unusual for a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Gender/Legends|woman]]. She was a perfectionist, especially in matters related to her business. She was a hard boss and was both unrelenting and unforgiving of mistakes. She had a superiority complex towards her customers and although she was pleasant to them when she met them personally, she would privately view most [[Species/Legends|species]] as being inferior.
She had [[Color/Legends|rust-colored]] skin and kept a calm demeanor at all times, even when angry.

==Behind the scenes==
Odanni was designed by [[Paul Danner]] and [[Bill Smith]] for ''[[Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy]]'', a supplement for the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' that was published by [[West End Games]] in [[1997]]. She was illustrated by [[Joel Carroll]].
